checks.note: full package: TestLookup + 1.2.1's TestNodeSerialization (5 subtests) all pass, no regression

validation_matrix_coverage: all 12 rows in validation-matrix.json covered (8 present, 2 absent-in-populated-leaf, 2 boundary)

bug_found_and_fixed_during_self_consiste.description: Initial test-scaffolding tree (buildTestTree) used the wrong separator key for internal2 (used leaf3's last key 'billing/plan' instead of leaf4's first key 'search/index'), which caused TestLookup/present to fail for 'billing/plan' -- Lookup's covering-convention logic was correct; the test tree's separator was inconsistent with the documented convention (Children[i] covers keys < Keys[i] for i==0, else covers keys >= previous separator; last child covers keys >= Keys[n-1], meaning Keys[n-1] must equal the first key of the last child, not the last key of the second-to-last child).
bug_found_and_fixed_during_self_consiste.fix: Changed internal2's Keys from ['billing/plan'] to ['search/index'] (leaf4's first key) in lookup_test.go; re-ran tests, all green.

not_done_self_verification: No independent self-verification was performed beyond these internal sanity checks (build/vet/test green, matrix covered); a separate /cdr:verify pass follows per protocol.
